subtasks.description: Service account 'svc-reporting' attempts to read the quarterly financial report from S3 bucket 'finance-reports'.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Service account 'svc-reporting' with role 'service' does not meet the minimum role requirement of 'finance-analyst' to read from the 'finance-reports' S3 bucket. Policy POL-301 denies this access.
